title:
NZGOAL review and release process decision tree
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## NZGOAL review and release process decision tree
A tool for assisting agencies which are working through the NZGOAL review and release process ahead of assigning a CC licence to the material they are releasing for re-use. It provides two diagrams, one for licensing copyright works for re-use, and one covering non-copyright works.

## The review and release process where copyright material is included

## The review and release process for non-copyright material
Last updated 8 August 2014
